case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. FRANK M. BRADY et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BRADY, FRANK M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-22-2012

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADY, FRANK M. $9,496.11 PRINCIPAL, $1,275.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $297.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,068.61, SEE SCANNED DOC
